Let me manually update the meta.json and tick again:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('N5/builds/zoputer-autonomy-v2/meta.json', 'r') as f:\\n    meta = json.load(f)\\nmeta['drops']['D1.1']['status'] = 'complete'\\nwith open('N5/builds/zoputer-autonomy-v2/meta.json', 'w') as f:\\n    json.dump(meta, f, indent=2)\\nprint('Updated D1.1 status to complete')\\n\\\"\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01GdLNJUrpB6fnyLcrDkefQt","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":81425,"cache_write_tokens":373,"cache_read_tokens":81051,"output_tokens":211,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":373,"cache_read_input_tokens":81051,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":211}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T17:35:31.814873Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01QXKdBsb3t3vgvjghSwEeRt","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"eaefa85e-d727-41c7-ad7b-d5aa93b3ba87","metadata":null}
